title: Recommendations in Progress | United States Preventive Services Taskforce
text:
ocess varies depending on the amount and type of available evidence and the time required for compilation of data into a draft recommendation, public comment periods and consideration of comments, and in-depth review and discussions among Task Force members.
View Published Recommendations To view a list of published recommendations from the Task Force, click here . 
Status of Active Topics 
Topics under review and development are a clickable list below.
Finalizing the Research Plan
(0 topics) 
Developing the Draft Recommendation Statement
(14 topics) 
Finalizing the Recommendation Statement
(4 topics) 
Finalizing the Research Plan 
Evidence-based Practice Center (EPC) and the USPSTF create a research plan that guides the recommendation process.
Topics Currently in this Stage 
Developing the Draft Recommendation Statement 
Systematic Review
EPC independently gathers and reviews the available published evidence 
Evidence review is critiqued by external national subject matter experts 
Draft Recommendation Development
USPSTF topic workgroup discusses the evidence and drafts a preliminary recommendation 
Full Task Force Review
Evidence review and draft recommendation are presented to the full Task Force 
All members discuss draft recommendation statement 
Topic workgroup drafts the full recommendation language, including clinical considerations and discussion 
Public Comment Opport
